import {
  BadRequestException,
  HttpException,
  HttpStatus,
  Injectable,
  Logger,
  NotFoundException,
} from '@nestjs/common';
import {
  CompressImageService,
  CloudflareR2Service,
  DbService,
  FirebaseStorageService,
  RequestContextService,
  ServerTimeService,
} from '@ai-music-video-studio/api-shared';
import { AssetService } from '@ai-music-video-studio/api-assets';
import { isChannelProfilePictureForChannel } from '@ai-music-video-studio/common';
import { config } from '@ai-music-video-studio/config';
import {
  CLOUD_STORAGE_FOLDERS,
  FIRESTORE_COLLECTIONS,
  PROFILE_PIC_FILE_NAME,
} from '@ai-music-video-studio/constants';
import {
  Channel,
  SetProfilePictureRes,
  UpdateFirestoreDocData,
} from '@ai-music-video-studio/models';
import { DocumentReference } from 'firebase-admin/firestore';
import { ChannelsService } from '../channels/channels.service';

/** Publishes asset-backed or generated-default profile pictures. */
@Injectable()
export class ProfilePicService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(ProfilePicService.name);

  constructor(
    private readonly firebaseStorageService: FirebaseStorageService,
    private readonly cloudflareR2Service: CloudflareR2Service,
    private readonly compressImageService: CompressImageService,
    private readonly requestContextService: RequestContextService,
    private readonly assetService: AssetService,
    private readonly dbService: DbService,
    private readonly channelsService: ChannelsService,
    private readonly serverTimeService: ServerTimeService,
  ) {}

  async setProfilePicture(
    assetId: string | null,
  ): Promise<SetProfilePictureRes> {
    const channelId = this.requestContextService.channelId();
    if (assetId === null) {
      return this.resetProfilePicture(channelId);
    }

    const asset = await this.assetService.getAsset(assetId);
    if (asset?.assetType !== 'image' || !asset.assetFileStoragePath) {
      throw new BadRequestException('A completed image asset is required');
    }

    const sourceMetadata =
      await this.firebaseStorageService.getFileObjectMetadata(
        asset.assetFileStoragePath,
      );
    if (
      sourceMetadata.fileSizeBytes > config.project.maxUploadImageAssetFileSize
    ) {
      throw new BadRequestException(
        'Profile picture source exceeds the size limit',
      );
    }
    if (sourceMetadata.objectGeneration === undefined) {
      throw new BadRequestException('Profile picture generation is missing');
    }

    const requestId = this.requestContextService.requestId();
    let profilePicturePath: string | undefined;
    try {
      await this.claimProfilePictureUpdateAttempt(channelId);
      const { buffer } = await this.firebaseStorageService.downloadFile(
        asset.assetFileStoragePath,
        { objectGeneration: sourceMetadata.objectGeneration },
      );
      profilePicturePath = this.getVersionedProfilePicturePath(
        channelId,
        requestId,
      );
      await this.uploadProfilePicture(buffer, profilePicturePath, {
        assetId,
        isCompressed: 'yes',
      }); // Generic asset thumbnails can be only 180px wide; regenerate the channel-owned 512px WebP from the immutable Firebase original when the asset is selected.
      const previousPath = await this.completeProfilePictureUpdate(
        channelId,
        profilePicturePath,
      );
      await this.deletePreviousProfilePicture(
        previousPath,
        profilePicturePath,
        channelId,
      );
      return { result: 'success' };
    } catch (error) {
      await this.deleteFailedProfilePicture(profilePicturePath, channelId);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  private async resetProfilePicture(
    channelId: string,
  ): Promise<SetProfilePictureRes> {
    const requestId = this.requestContextService.requestId();
    let profilePictureFileStoragePath: string | undefined;
    try {
      const channel = await this.claimProfilePictureUpdateAttempt(channelId);
      profilePictureFileStoragePath =
        await this.channelsService.generateDefaultProfilePicture(
          channel.name,
          channelId,
          requestId,
        );
      const previousPath = await this.completeProfilePictureUpdate(
        channelId,
        profilePictureFileStoragePath,
      );
      await this.deletePreviousProfilePicture(
        previousPath,
        profilePictureFileStoragePath,
        channelId,
      );
      return { result: 'success' };
    } catch (error) {
      await this.deleteFailedProfilePicture(
        profilePictureFileStoragePath,
        channelId,
      );
      throw error;
    }
  }

  private async uploadProfilePicture(
    inputBuffer: Buffer,
    profilePicturePath: string,
    metadata: Record<string, string>,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const compressed = await this.compressImageService.compress(inputBuffer, {
      maxWidth: 512,
      maxHeight: 512,
      quality: 80,
      format: 'webp',
    });
    await this.cloudflareR2Service.uploadFromBuffer(
      compressed.buffer,
      profilePicturePath,
      {
        contentType: 'image/webp',
        cacheControl: config.files.cacheControl.profilePic,
        metadata,
      },
    );
  }

  private async claimProfilePictureUpdateAttempt(
    channelId: string,
  ): Promise<Channel> {
    const attemptedAt = await this.serverTimeService.getServerTimestamp();
    const now = attemptedAt.toMillis();
    const cooldown = config.channel.timeBeforeCanUpdateProfilePictureAgain;
    const channelRef = this.dbService.db
      .collection(FIRESTORE_COLLECTIONS.channels)
      .doc(channelId) as DocumentReference<Channel>;

    return channelRef.firestore.runTransaction(async (transaction) => {
      const channel = (await transaction.get(channelRef)).data();
      if (!channel) throw new NotFoundException('Channel not found');
      const lastAttempt = channel.dateLastUpdatedProfilePicture;
      if (lastAttempt) {
        const retryAfter = cooldown - (now - lastAttempt.toMillis());
        if (retryAfter > 0) {
          throw new HttpException(
            {
              statusCode: HttpStatus.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
              message: `You can change your profile picture again in ${Math.ceil(retryAfter / (60 * 1000))} minutes`,
              retryAfterMs: retryAfter,
            },
            HttpStatus.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
          );
        }
      }
      transaction.update(channelRef, {
        dateLastUpdatedProfilePicture: attemptedAt,
      } satisfies UpdateFirestoreDocData<Channel>); // Bug: the old cooldown was recorded after image processing, so rejected requests could still consume worker time; transactionally claim the attempt before downloading or decoding it.
      return channel;
    });
  }

  private async completeProfilePictureUpdate(
    channelId: string,
    profilePictureFileStoragePath: string,
  ): Promise<string | undefined> {
    const channelRef = this.dbService.db
      .collection(FIRESTORE_COLLECTIONS.channels)
      .doc(channelId) as DocumentReference<Channel>;
    return channelRef.firestore.runTransaction(async (transaction) => {
      const channel = (await transaction.get(channelRef)).data();
      if (!channel) throw new NotFoundException('Channel not found');
      transaction.update(channelRef, {
        profilePictureFileStoragePath,
      } satisfies UpdateFirestoreDocData<Channel>); // Versioned R2 objects keep the current picture unchanged until the new bytes exist; publish only the completed object's pointer.
      return channel.profilePictureFileStoragePath;
    });
  }

  private async deletePreviousProfilePicture(
    previousPath: string | undefined,
    currentPath: string,
    channelId: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    if (
      !previousPath ||
      previousPath === currentPath ||
      !isChannelProfilePictureForChannel(previousPath, channelId)
    ) {
      return;
    }
    await this.cloudflareR2Service.deleteFile(previousPath).catch((error) => {
      this.logger.warn(
        { channelId, previousPath, error },
        'Failed to delete replaced profile picture',
      );
    });
  }

  private async deleteFailedProfilePicture(
    fileStoragePath: string | undefined,
    channelId: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    if (!fileStoragePath) return;
    await this.cloudflareR2Service
      .deleteFile(fileStoragePath)
      .catch((error) => {
        this.logger.warn(
          { channelId, fileStoragePath, error },
          'Failed to delete unpublished profile picture',
        );
      }); // Bug: R2 can commit before its response or the Firestore publish fails, leaving an orphaned version; assign the path first and remove that unpublished object on every failed request.
  }

  private getVersionedProfilePicturePath(
    channelId: string,
    requestId: string,
  ): string {
    return `${CLOUD_STORAGE_FOLDERS.channels}/${channelId}/${PROFILE_PIC_FILE_NAME}-${requestId}.webp`; // A unique R2 key avoids exposing or overwriting the current picture before Firestore publishes the completed replacement, and its new URL also avoids stale image caches.
  }
}
